Actions will be forced to run with Node.js 24 by default starting June 2nd, 2026. Node.js 20 will be removed from the runner on September 16th, 2026. Please check if updated versions of these actions are available that support Node.js 24. To opt into Node.js 24 now, set the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true environment variable on the runner or in your workflow file. Once Node.js 24 becomes the default, you can temporarily opt out by setting ACTIONS_ALLOW_USE_UNSECURE_NODE_VERSION=true. author: ka0score
body:
### Suite
docs

### Mode
offline

### Pregunta
Documentación Ka0s:

¿Cómo creo un nuevo módulo en `core/docs/<modulo>/` y como se actualiza el índice/nav para que aparezca en el portal?

Dame:
- rutas exactas
- pasos mínimos
- verificación mínima antes de darlo por Done

### Debe contener (must_contain)
- core/docs/
- mkdocs.yml
- .github/scripts/update-docs-index.py
- core/docs/README.md
- deploy-docs-portal.yml\n\n<- Suite docs: añade asserts ( título + index.md rerun: 2026-03-19T15:58:04Z -->
title: [AGENT-EVAL][DOCS]: Crear módulo y publicar docs
